__comment__: Canonical bare-HTML-tag -> SGS-block bridge (D270, 2026-07-04). SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for what SGS block an un-BEM-classed HTML tag becomes during cloning (the atomic-tag walker exception, Spec 31 §13.2 FR-31-3). Encodes universal HTML semantics (every <h2> -> sgs/heading), NOT per-block or per-case routing. Loaded once into the html_tag_to_core_block DB table by db_lookup._migrate_html_tag_to_core_block(); the runtime reads the DB, never this file. Values are [target_sgs_block_slug, note]. Keys starting with __ are ignored. Edit HERE.
button: Bare button — walker auto-wraps in sgs/multi-button
a: Link shape — routes to the same atomic leaf as button
ol: Ordered list → SGS icon-list (ordered flag set via _atomic_attrs_for items)
